CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[CLEAN_LOG] AS 

IF OBJECT_ID ('tempdb..#db') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE  #db  

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY name ASC) AS id, name  into #db
FROM sys.databases 
where 
(name not in ('master','model','msdb','SSISDB','tempdb') and name not like '%BD_backup%' )

--select * from #db

declare @cont int = (select min(id) from #db)
declare @max int = (select max(id) from #db)
declare @namedb varchar(100) 
declare @sql varchar(max) 


while (@cont < @max+1) 
begin
set @namedb = (select [name] from #db where id = @cont) 
set @sql = '
USE '+@namedb+' 
--GO 
ALTER DATABASE '+@namedb+' 
SET RECOVERY SIMPLE
--GO 
DBCC SHRINKFILE ('+@namedb+'_Log, 1) 
--GO 
ALTER DATABASE '+@namedb+' 
SET RECOVERY FULL
'

EXEC (@sql)

set @cont =@cont+1
end

CREATE Procedure sp_get_ip_address (@ip varchar(40) out) AS 
begin 
Declare @ipLine varchar(200) 
Declare @pos int 

	set nocount on 

	set @ip = NULL 

	Create table #temp (ipLine varchar(200)) 

	Insert #temp exec master..xp_cmdshell 'ipconfig' 

	select @ipLine = ipLine 
	from #temp 
	where upper (ipLine) like '%IPv4 ADDRESS%' 

	if (isnull (@ipLine,'***') != '***') 
	begin 
		set @pos = CharIndex (':',@ipLine,1); 
		set @ip = rtrim(ltrim(substring (@ipLine , @pos + 1 , len (@ipLine) - @pos))) 
	end 

	drop table #temp 

	set nocount off 

end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[SP_SHRINK_DATA] AS

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DBsizes') IS NOT NULL
DROP TABLE #DBsizes

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DBlistadata') IS NOT NULL
DROP TABLE #DBlistadata

DECLARE @SQL VARCHAR(8000)

CREATE TABLE #DBsizes
(
	ServerName nvarchar(max),
	DBname nvarchar(max),
	Filename nvarchar(max),
	CurrentSize INT,
	SpaceUsed	INT,
	CurrentAvailableSpace	INT,
	Growth INT,
	Physical nvarchar(max),
	status INT,
)

EXEC sp_MSforeachdb'
USE [?]
INSERT INTO #DBsizes
SELECT
		@@SERVERNAME,
		db_name(),
		ms.name, 
		-- Current Size		
		sf.size/128,
		-- Used space
		fileproperty(sf.name,''SpaceUsed'')/128,
		-- Current Available space
		(sf.size-fileproperty(sf.name,''SpaceUsed''))/128,
		CASE
			WHEN sf.growth < 0 THEN -1
			WHEN sf.growth = 0 THEN 0
			ELSE (sf.growth)/128
		END,
		ms.filename,
		sf.status
FROM	master.dbo.sysaltfiles ms, dbo.sysfiles sf
WHERE	dbid = DB_ID()
		AND ms.fileid = sf.FILEID
		AND sf.groupid <> 0
		AND dbid <> 2
';

WITH Cte
AS
(
SELECT
	DBname,
	Filename,
	SUBSTRING(Physical,1,1) as [Drive],
	CurrentSize,
	SpaceUsed,
	Growth,
	CASE
		WHEN Growth <= 0 THEN (SpaceUsed*1)+1
		ELSE ((SpaceUsed/Growth) + 1) * Growth
	END as TargetSize,
	'USE ' + QUOTENAME(DBname) + '; DBCC SHRINKFILE(N'''+Filename+''' , 0, TRUNCATEONLY);' as 'TruncateOnly',
	CASE
		WHEN Growth <= 0 THEN 'USE ' + QUOTENAME(DBname) + '; DBCC SHRINKFILE(N'''+Filename+''' , '+CAST(CAST((SpaceUsed*1) + 1 AS FLOAT) as NVARCHAR(MAX))+' );'
		ELSE 'USE ' + QUOTENAME(DBname) + '; DBCC SHRINKFILE(N'''+Filename+''' , '+ CAST(CAST((((SpaceUsed/Growth) + 1) * Growth) AS FLOAT) as NVARCHAR(MAX)) +');'
	END as 'ShrinkFile'
FROM #DBsizes
)
SELECT 
	DBname,
	Filename,
	Drive,
	CurrentSize,
	SpaceUsed,
	CAST(SpaceUsed as FLOAT)*100.0/(CurrentSize+1) as 'SpaceUsed_Pct',
	TargetSize,
	CurrentSize - TargetSize as [PotentialGain],
	CAST(CurrentSize - TargetSize as FLOAT)*100.0/(CurrentSize+1) as 'PotentialGain_Pct',
	TruncateOnly,
	ShrinkFile,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY DBNAME) ORDEN
INTO #DBlistadata
FROM cte
ORDER BY Drive ASC, PotentialGain DESC


DECLARE @Counter INT 
DECLARE @Countertot INT 
DECLARE @sql0 varchar(MAX)

SET @Counter = 1
SET @Countertot =  (SELECT MAX(ORDEN)MAXID FROM TEMPDB.DBO.#DBlistadata)

WHILE ( @Counter <= @Countertot )
BEGIN
DECLARE @CAMPO VARCHAR(100) 
SET @CAMPO = (SELECT TRUNCATEONLY FROM TEMPDB.DBO.#DBlistadata WHERE ORDEN = @Counter)

SET @sql0 =
''+@CAMPO+''
EXEC (@SQL0)

SET @Counter = @Counter  + 1
END



IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DBsizes') IS NOT NULL
DROP TABLE #DBsizes

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DBlistadata') IS NOT NULL
DROP TABLE #DBlistadata

-- Description:	< Consolida los datos del GPPESVLCLI2251 >

-- PASO_2 : CAPTURA BASE DATOS
-- PASO_3 : CAPTURA TABLAS

CREATE PROC [dbo].[SPADM_POBLAR_SERV_BD_TABLAS]
-- =============================================
-- Author:		<JUAN GUZMAN>
-- Create date: <2022-05-09>
-- Description:	<Proceso que captura los espacios de disco duro, bd y tablas >

-- PreRequisitos: 

-- PASO_1 : CAPTURA IP
-- PASO_2 : CAPTURA DISCO DUROS
-- PASO_3 : CAPTURA BASE DATOS
-- PASO_4 : CAPTURA TABLAS

-- =============================================
AS

BEGIN

------------------------------
-- PASO_1 : CAPTURA IP
------------------------------


	declare @IP_SERVIDOR varchar(40) 

	exec sp_get_ip_address @IP_SERVIDOR out

------------------------------
-- PASO_2 : CAPTURA DISCO DUROS
------------------------------

	IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM BD_CONTROL.dbo.SYSOBJECTS WHERE NAME = 'T_ADMIN_DISCO_DURO_ANTERIOR')
	BEGIN
		TRUNCATE TABLE T_ADMIN_DISCO_DURO_ANTERIOR

		DROP TABLE T_ADMIN_DISCO_DURO_ANTERIOR
	END

	SELECT	*
	INTO	BD_CONTROL.dbo.T_ADMIN_DISCO_DURO_ANTERIOR
	FROM	BD_CONTROL.dbo.T_ADMIN_DISCO_DURO

	TRUNCATE TABLE BD_CONTROL.dbo.T_ADMIN_DISCO_DURO

	INSERT INTO BD_CONTROL.dbo.T_ADMIN_DISCO_DURO
	( AD_SERVIDOR_NOMBRE , AD_SERVIDOR_IP , AD_SERVIDOR_UNIDAD_DISCO , AD_SERVIDOR_TOTAL_GB 
	, AD_SERVIDOR_TOTAL_GB_USADO, AD_SERVIDOR_TOTAL_GB_DISPONIBLE )

	SELECT DISTINCT
			 CONVERT(VARCHAR,@@SERVERNAME) AS 'NOMBRE_SERVIDOR'  
			, @IP_SERVIDOR AS 'IP_SERVIDOR'
			, CONVERT(VARCHAR,SUBSTRING(volume_mount_point, 1, 1)) AS UNIDAD_DISCO
			, ((total_bytes/1024)/1024)/1024.0 AS TOTAL_GB
			, ((total_bytes/1024)/1024)/1024.0 - ((available_bytes/1024)/1024)/1024.0 AS TOTAL_USADO_GB
			, ((available_bytes/1024)/1024)/1024.0 AS TOTAL_DISPONIBLE_GB
	FROM
			sys.master_files AS UNIDADES
			CROSS APPLY
						sys.dm_os_volume_stats(UNIDADES.database_id, UNIDADES.file_id)

------------------------------
-- PASO_3 : CAPTURA BASE DATOS
------------------------------

	IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM BD_CONTROL.dbo.SYSOBJECTS WHERE NAME = 'T_ADMIN_BASE_DATOS_ANTERIOR')
	BEGIN
		TRUNCATE TABLE T_ADMIN_BASE_DATOS_ANTERIOR

		DROP TABLE T_ADMIN_BASE_DATOS_ANTERIOR
	END

	SELECT	*
	INTO	BD_CONTROL.dbo.T_ADMIN_BASE_DATOS_ANTERIOR
	FROM	BD_CONTROL.dbo.T_ADMIN_BASE_DATOS


	TRUNCATE TABLE BD_CONTROL.dbo.T_ADMIN_BASE_DATOS

	INSERT INTO  BD_CONTROL.dbo.T_ADMIN_BASE_DATOS
	(
	 AD_SERVIDOR_NOMBRE, AD_SERVIDOR_IP , AD_BD_NOMBRE , AD_BD_TIPO , AD_BD_UNIDAD_DISCO  
	, AD_BD_TAMANIO_EN_DISCO_EN_GB , AD_BD_LIMITE_CRECIMIENTO , AD_BD_MAXIMO_TAMANIO_EN_DISCO_EN_GB
	, AD_BD_ESPACIO_PARA_CRECER , AD_BD_CRECIMIENTO , AD_BD_TIPO_CRECIMIENTO  , AD_BD_ESTADO , AD_BD_FECHA_CREACION 
	)
	SELECT	CONVERT(VARCHAR,@@SERVERNAME) AS 'SERVIDOR'  
			, @IP_SERVIDOR AS 'IP_SERVIDOR'
			, TA.name AS [BASE_DATOS] 
			, TB.type_desc AS [TIPO]
			, LEFT(TB.physical_name,1) AS UNIDAD_DISCO
			, ((SUM(size) * 8)/1024)/1024.0  AS [TAMANIO_EN_DISCO_EN_GB] 
			, CASE WHEN ((SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC,max_size))*8) /1024)/1024.0 < 0 THEN 'SIN_LIMITE' ELSE 'CON_LIMITE' END AS [LIMITE_CRECIMIENTO]  
			, CASE WHEN ((SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC,max_size))*8) /1024)/1024.0 < 0 THEN 1000000 ELSE ((SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC,max_size))*8) /1024)/1024.0 END  AS [MAXIMO_TAMANIO_EN_DISCO_EN_GB]  
			, CASE WHEN ((SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC,max_size))*8) /1024)/1024.0 < 0  THEN 1000000 - ((SUM(size) * 8)/1024)/1024.0   ELSE ((SUM(CONVERT(NUMERIC,max_size))*8) /1024)/1024.0  -  ((SUM(size) * 8)/1024)/1024.0 END AS ESPACIO_PARA_CRECER
			, CASE WHEN TB.is_percent_growth = 1 THEN TB.growth  ELSE (TB.growth*8)/1024.0 END  AS [CRECIMIENTO]
			, CASE WHEN TB.is_percent_growth = 1 THEN 'EN_PORCENTAJE' ELSE 'EN_MB' END AS [TIPO_CRECIMIENTO]
			,TB.state_desc as BD_ESTADO
			,cast(create_date as date)as BD_FECHA_CREACION

	FROM	sys.databases TA JOIN sys.master_files TB
	ON		TA.database_id = TB.database_id 
	GROUP BY TA.name 
			, TB.type_desc 
			, LEFT(TB.physical_name,1) 
			, CASE WHEN TB.is_percent_growth = 1 THEN TB.growth  ELSE (TB.growth*8)/1024.0 END
			, CASE WHEN TB.is_percent_growth = 1 THEN 'EN_PORCENTAJE' ELSE 'EN_MB' END
			,	TB.state_desc 
			,	cast(create_date as date)


------------------------------
-- PASO_4 : CAPTURA TABLAS
------------------------------

	IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM BD_CONTROL.dbo.SYSOBJECTS WHERE NAME = 'T_ADMIN_TAMANIO_TABLAS_ANTERIOR')
	BEGIN
		TRUNCATE TABLE T_ADMIN_TAMANIO_TABLAS_ANTERIOR

		DROP TABLE T_ADMIN_TAMANIO_TABLAS_ANTERIOR
	END

	SELECT	*
	INTO	BD_CONTROL.dbo.T_ADMIN_TAMANIO_TABLAS_ANTERIOR
	FROM	BD_CONTROL.dbo.T_ADMIN_TAMANIO_TABLAS


	TRUNCATE TABLE BD_CONTROL.dbo.T_ADMIN_TAMANIO_TABLAS

		SET NOCOUNT ON 
		DBCC UPDATEUSAGE(0) 
		-- Table row counts and sizes.
		DECLARE @sizes TABLE
		(
		Servidor NVARCHAR(128),
		DB NVARCHAR(128),
		Tabla NVARCHAR(128),
		[Rows] CHAR(11),
		Reserved decimal(8,2),
		Data decimal(8,2),
		Index_size decimal(8,2),
		Unused decimal(8,2),
		CREADO DATETIME,
		ULTIMA_MODIF DATETIME
		)

		INSERT @sizes 
		exec sp_msforeachdb @command1='USE ?; SELECT @@servername Servidor , 
		DB_NAME() DB,
		X.[name] Tabla, 

		X.[rows], 

		CAST(X.[reserved] AS FLOAT)/1024 as reservado_mb, 

		CAST(X.[data] AS FLOAT)/1024, 

		CAST(X.[index_size] AS FLOAT)/1024 as index_mb, 

		CAST(X.[unused]AS FLOAT)/1024 as sin_usar_mb,

		X.creado,

		X.ultima_modif

		FROM 
		(SELECT 
		CAST(object_name(id) AS varchar(120)) 
		AS [name], 
		SUM(CASE WHEN indid < 2 THEN CONVERT(bigint, [rows]) END) 
		AS [rows],
		SUM(CONVERT(bigint, reserved)) * 8 
		AS reserved, 
		SUM(CONVERT(bigint, dpages)) * 8 
		AS data, 
		SUM(CONVERT(bigint, used) - CONVERT(bigint, dpages)) * 8 
		AS index_size, 
		SUM(CONVERT(bigint, reserved) - CONVERT(bigint, used)) * 8 
		AS unused,
		max(cast(t.create_date as date)) as creado,
		max(t.modify_date) as ultima_modif
		FROM sysindexes i WITH (NOLOCK) 
			INNER JOIN  
		sys.tables t
		ON t.OBJECT_ID = i.id

		WHERE i.indid IN (0, 1, 255) 
		AND i.id > 100 
		AND object_name(i.id) <> ''dtproperties'' 
		GROUP BY i.id WITH ROLLUP
		) AS X
		WHERE X.[name] is not null
		ORDER BY X.[rows] DESC'



		INSERT INTO BD_CONTROL.dbo.[T_ADMIN_TAMANIO_TABLAS]
		(
		AD_SERVIDOR_NOMBRE ,  AD_SERVIDOR_IP , AD_BD_NOMBRE , AD_TABLA_NOMBRE 
		, AD_TABLA_FILAS , AD_TABLA_ESPACIO_RESERVADO  , AD_TABLA_ESPACIO_DATA 
		, AD_TABLA_TAMANIO_INDICE , AD_TABLA_ESPACIO_NO_USADO , AD_TABLA_FECHA_CREACION
		, AD_TABLA_FECHA_ULTIMA_MODIF_EXTRUCTURA  
		)
		SELECT 
			Servidor, @IP_SERVIDOR AS 'IP_SERVIDOR'
			, DB , Tabla , 	[Rows] , Reserved , [Data] , Index_size , Unused , CREADO 
			, ULTIMA_MODIF 
		FROM @sizes 




END

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[vw_Inventario_Jobs_Servidores_Contact_Center]
as
SELECT job.[JOB_ID],[NAME] NOMBRE_JOB, (CASE WHEN [enabled]=1 THEN 'Activo' else 'Inactivo' end) ESTADO_JOB
,[description]
--,CHARINDEX(':', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion))+1
--,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion)+1)
--,CHARINDEX(':', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion)+1)-1
--,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion)+1)-CHARINDEX(':', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion)+1)-1
--,rtrim(ltrim(substring(descripcion,CHARINDEX(':', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion))+1,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion)+1)-CHARINDEX(':', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion)+1)-1)))
,(CASE WHEN rtrim(ltrim(substring(descripcion,CHARINDEX(':', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion))+1,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion)+1)-CHARINDEX(':', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion)+1)-1)))<>'' THEN 'Revisado' ELSE 'Sin Revisar' END) FLAG_VALIDACION
,(CASE WHEN rtrim(ltrim(substring(descripcion,CHARINDEX(':', descripcion)+1,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion)-CHARINDEX(':', descripcion)-1)))<>'' THEN rtrim(ltrim(substring(descripcion,CHARINDEX(':', descripcion)+1,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion)-CHARINDEX(':', descripcion)-1))) ELSE 'Sin Macroproceso' END) MACROPROCESO
,(CASE WHEN rtrim(ltrim(substring(descripcion,CHARINDEX(':', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion))+1,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion)+1)-CHARINDEX(':', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion)+1)-1)))<>'' THEN rtrim(ltrim(substring(descripcion,CHARINDEX(':', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion))+1,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion)+1)-CHARINDEX(':', descripcion,CHARINDEX('/', descripcion)+1)-1))) ELSE 'Sin Responsable' END) RESPONSABLE
,(CASE WHEN RTRIM(LTRIM(substring(descripcion,CHARINDEX(':', descripcion,CHARINDEX('Detalle', descripcion))+1,250)))<>'' THEN RTRIM(LTRIM(substring(descripcion,CHARINDEX(':', descripcion,CHARINDEX('Detalle', descripcion))+1,250))) ELSE 'Sin Detalle' END) DESCRIPCION
,CAST(date_created AS DATE) FECHA_CREACION_JOB
,CAST(date_modified AS DATE) FECHA_ULT_MODIFICACION_JOB
,substring(cast(next_run_date as varchar(8)),1,4)+'-'+substring(cast(next_run_date as varchar(8)),5,2)+'-'+substring(cast(next_run_date as varchar(8)),7,2) FECHA_PROX_EJECUCION_JOB
,(SUBSTRING(RIGHT('00000'+CAST(schd.next_run_time AS VARCHAR(6)),6),1,2)+':'+SUBSTRING(RIGHT('00000'+CAST(schd.next_run_time AS VARCHAR(6)),6),3,2)) HORA_EJECUCION_JOB
,CASE WHEN last_run_time = 0 then 0 
WHEN len(last_run_time) in (1,2) THEN cast(right(last_run_time,2)/3600.0  as numeric(6,1))
WHEN len(last_run_time) = 3 then cast(left(last_run_time,1)/60.0 + right(last_run_time,2)/3600.0 as numeric(6,1))  
WHEN len(last_run_time) = 4 then cast(left(last_run_time,2)/60.0 + right(last_run_time,2)/3600.0 as numeric(6,1))
WHEN len(last_run_time) = 5 then cast(left(last_run_time,1)+ substring(CAST(last_run_time as varchar(max)),2,2)/60.0 + right(last_run_time,2)/3600.0 as numeric(6,1))
WHEN len(last_run_time) = 6 then cast(left(last_run_time,2) + substring(CAST(last_run_time as varchar(max)),3,2)/60.0 + right(last_run_time,2)/3600.0 as numeric(6,1)) END inicio_job_hora
,T.horas
,T.minutos
FROM (
select case when [description] not like '%:%/%:%/%:%' then 'Macroproceso:/Responsable:/Detalle_Job:' else [description] end descripcion,*
FROM msdb.dbo.sysjobs) job

inner join msdb.dbo.sysjobsteps   b
on job.job_id=b.job_id and step_id='1'
inner join
(
select X.job_id, sum(X.segundos) as segundos, 
cast(sum(X.segundos)/60.0 as numeric(6,1)) as minutos , 
cast(sum(X.segundos)/3600.0 as numeric(6,1)) as horas
FROM
(
select job_id,step_id,last_run_duration,
CASE WHEN len(last_run_duration) in (1,2) THEN right(last_run_duration,2) 
WHEN len(last_run_duration) = 3 THEN left(last_run_duration,1)*60 + right(last_run_duration,2)
WHEN len(last_run_duration) = 4 THEN left(last_run_duration,2)*60 + right(last_run_duration,2)
WHEN len(last_run_duration) = 5 THEN left(last_run_duration,1)*3600 + substring(CAST(last_run_duration as varchar(max)),2,2)*60 + right(last_run_duration,2) end segundos

 FROM msdb.dbo.sysjobsteps 
 ) X
 group by X.job_id
 ) T
 on job.job_id = T.job_id

left JOIN (SELECT  ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY JOB_ID ORDER BY NEXT_RUN_TIME asc ) idx,
*
FROM msdb.[dbo].[sysjobschedules] ) schd
on (job.job_id=schd.job_id
AND idx=1)

WHERE  JOB.name NOT in (select NAME from  msdb.dbo.sysjobs where name LIKE 'NEG_%') 
and JOB.name NOT in (select NAME from  msdb.dbo.sysjobs where name LIKE 'SA_%') 
and JOB.name NOT in (select NAME from  msdb.dbo.sysjobs where name LIKE 'OS_%') 
and JOB.name NOT in (select NAME from  msdb.dbo.sysjobs where name LIKE '_ELIMINAR%')
AND JOB.name NOT in (select NAME from  msdb.dbo.sysjobs where name LIKE 'SSIS%')
AND JOB.name NOT in (select NAME from  msdb.dbo.sysjobs where name LIKE 'sys%')
AND job.[enabled]=1

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[spREGUL_Consolidacion_Regulados_AURA_Base_Envio_OSIPTEL] AS

BEGIN

DECLARE @SQL VARCHAR(8000),@PERIODO VARCHAR(6),@YESTERDAY VARCHAR(8)

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[spREGUL_Consolidacion_Regulados_PW_Lenguaje_Natural_yesterday] AS

BEGIN

DECLARE @SQL VARCHAR(8000),@PERIODO VARCHAR(6),@YESTERDAY VARCHAR(8)
DECLARE @TABLA_RESUMEN_MES VARCHAR(8000), @TABLA_FUENTE_MES_D_MENOS_1 VARCHAR(8000)

SET @PERIODO =	LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR,GETDATE()-1,112),6)
SET @YESTERDAY = CONVERT(VARCHAR,CAST(GETDATE()-1 AS DATE),112)

--PRINT @PERIODO

SET @TABLA_RESUMEN_MES = '[BD_REGULADOS].[dbo].[T_REGULATORIO_LENGUAJE_NATURAL_'+@PERIODO+']'

--SET @TABLA_FUENTE_MES_D_MENOS_1 = '[172.30.249.167].[Repo_Contact_Center].[dbo].[T_DETALLE_CDR_LN_202211]'
--SET @TABLA_FUENTE_MES_D_MENOS_1 = '[172.30.249.167].[Repo_Contact_Center].[dbo].[T_DETALLE_CDR_LN_MES]' --mes actual

IF(
	(select top 1 LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR,CAST(LEFT(CDR_START_DATETIME,10) AS DATE),112),6)
		from [172.30.249.167].[Repo_Contact_Center].[dbo].[T_DETALLE_CDR_LN_MES])
						= @PERIODO 
	) 
		BEGIN
			SET @TABLA_FUENTE_MES_D_MENOS_1 = '[172.30.249.167].[Repo_Contact_Center].[dbo].[T_DETALLE_CDR_LN_MES]' --mes actual
	END
				
ELSE
	  BEGIN
			SET @TABLA_FUENTE_MES_D_MENOS_1 = '[172.30.249.167].[Repo_Contact_Center].[dbo].[T_DETALLE_CDR_LN_'+@PERIODO+']'
	END
			

--PRINT @TABLA_FUENTE_MES_D_MENOS_1

--select CONVERT(VARCHAR,CAST(GETDATE()-1 AS DATE),112)
--=====================================  SE CREA LA TABLA CORRESPONDIENTE AL MES EN CASO NO EXISTA

IF  NOT EXISTS(SELECT name FROM [BD_REGULADOS].dbo.sysobjects WHERE name ='T_REGULATORIO_LENGUAJE_NATURAL_'+@PERIODO AND TYPE='U')
BEGIN
	SET @SQL = 'SELECT A.* INTO '+@TABLA_RESUMEN_MES+'
								FROM [BD_REGULADOS].dbo.[T_REGULATORIO_LENGUAJE_NATURAL_'+LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR,DATEADD(MM,-1,CAST(@PERIODO+'01' AS DATE)),112),6)+'] A
								WHERE 1=2'
	EXEC(@SQL)
END				

--=====================================  SE ACTUALIZA EL DETALLE 1 A 1 DE LOS ACCESOS QUE LLEGAN A PREGUNTA ABIERTA EN LA TABLA DEL MES

SET @SQL='

--DELETE FROM [BD_REGULADOS].dbo.T_REGULATORIO_LENGUAJE_NATURAL_'+@PERIODO+'
--WHERE REPLACE(LEFT(CDR_START_DATETIME,7),''-'','''')='''+@PERIODO+'''

TRUNCATE TABLE '+@TABLA_RESUMEN_MES+'


'
EXEC(@SQL)

SET @SQL='
INSERT INTO '+@TABLA_RESUMEN_MES+'
	(CDR_START_DATETIME,CDR_SESSION_ID,CDR_CALL_ID,CDR_SITE,CDR_TRACE,TIEMPOS,CDR_DNIS)

SELECT	CDR_START_DATETIME
		, CDR_SESSION_ID 
		, CDR_CALL_ID
		, CDR_SITE
		, CDR_TRACE
		, LEFT(REPLACE(REPLACE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),CDR_TRACE),''bpnGreeting:'',''''),'' bpnInitial:'',''-''),CHARINDEX('' '',REPLACE(REPLACE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),CDR_TRACE),''bpnGreeting:'',''''),'' bpnInitial:'',''-''))) AS TIEMPOS
		, CDR_DNIS

FROM '+@TABLA_FUENTE_MES_D_MENOS_1+' WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE	REPLACE(LEFT(CDR_START_DATETIME,7),''-'','''') = '''+@PERIODO+'''

/**** para segurar que llega a pregunta abierta ***/
AND		(CDR_TRACE LIKE ''bpnGreeting%''
AND		CDR_TRACE LIKE ''%bpnInitial%''
AND		CDR_TRACE LIKE ''%bpnPrompt%'')
/**** para segurar que llega a pregunta abierta ***/

AND     CDR_DNIS NOT IN (''eddie'')
AND		REPLACE(LEFT(CDR_START_DATETIME,10),''-'','''')<='''+@YESTERDAY+'''
'
EXEC(@SQL)

--


--SE AGREGA 0800 CDR_DNIS IN ('0117001013','0117001014')  CDR_TRACE LIKE '%bpnIVR800%' EL  CUAL TIENE CUATRO TIEMPOS HASTA PREGUNTA ABIERTA


SET @SQL='
UPDATE A
SET A.TIEMPOS = LEFT(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),CDR_TRACE),''bpnGreeting:'',''''),'' bpnIVR800:'',''-''),'' :'',''-''),'' bpnInitial:'',''-''),CHARINDEX('' '',REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),CDR_TRACE),''bpnGreeting:'',''''),'' bpnIVR800:'',''-''),'' :'',''-''),'' bpnInitial:'',''-'')))
FROM	'+@TABLA_RESUMEN_MES+' A
WHERE	REPLACE(LEFT(CDR_START_DATETIME,7),''-'','''') = '''+@PERIODO+'''
AND		(CDR_TRACE LIKE ''bpnGreeting%''
AND		CDR_TRACE LIKE ''%bpnInitial%''
AND		CDR_TRACE LIKE ''%bpnPrompt%'')
AND     CDR_TRACE LIKE ''%bpnIVR800%''
AND     CDR_DNIS IN (''0117001013'',''0117001014'') 
AND     CDR_DNIS NOT IN (''eddie'')
AND		REPLACE(LEFT(CDR_START_DATETIME,10),''-'','''')<='''+@YESTERDAY+'''
'
EXEC(@SQL)

-- CAMBIO ERRORES DE CDR_TRACE CON LOS TIEMPOS

SET @SQL='
UPDATE A
SET A.TIEMPOS = REPLACE(A.TIEMPOS,''--'',''-'')
FROM '+@TABLA_RESUMEN_MES+' A
WHERE TIEMPOS LIKE ''%--%''
'
EXEC(@SQL)

SET @SQL='

SET A.TIEMPOS = RIGHT(TIEMPOS,LEN(TIEMPOS))
FROM '+@TABLA_RESUMEN_MES+'  A
WHERE  TIEMPOS LIKE ''-%''
'

SET A.Suma_tiempo_PA_ms = CONVERT(INT,LEFT(TIEMPOS,CHARINDEX(''-'',TIEMPOS)-1)) +
		--CONVERT(INT,SUBSTRING(TIEMPOS,CHARINDEX(''-'',TIEMPOS)+1,CHARINDEX(''-'',TIEMPOS,CHARINDEX(''-'',TIEMPOS)+1)-CHARINDEX(''-'',TIEMPOS)-1))+
		--CONVERT(INT,SUBSTRING(TIEMPOS,CHARINDEX(''-'',TIEMPOS,CHARINDEX(''-'',TIEMPOS)+1)+1,CHARINDEX(''-'',TIEMPOS,CHARINDEX(''-'',TIEMPOS,CHARINDEX(''-'',TIEMPOS)+1)+1)-CHARINDEX(''-'',TIEMPOS,CHARINDEX(''-'',TIEMPOS)+1)-1))+
		CONVERT(INT,RIGHT(RTRIM(TIEMPOS),LEN(TIEMPOS)-CHARINDEX(''-'',TIEMPOS,CHARINDEX(''-'',TIEMPOS,CHARINDEX(''-'',TIEMPOS)+1)+1)))
FROM '+@TABLA_RESUMEN_MES+'  A
WHERE CDR_DNIS IN (''0117001014'',''0117001013'')
	AND CDR_CALL_ID NOT IN (''lpreies2pr776lpf2l6f27eu4l67icp2@SoftX3000'',''FAD82C9DB246D963F788CB17@6642ffffffff'',''5A9C53C7492E1E551EEB8897@6543ffffffff'',''e4uu4rpriq6i2rifiqmecqcc6plil6qi@SoftX3000'',''cmscsocrpi26q7lurp2q7p2olepqmifi@SoftX3000''
					,''e0lf1wzwz2w7t12thztx7w2ewww0x116@SoftX3000'',''zwz7efkkxy6xwhexlk02277lxyzhxkhl@SoftX3000'',''7uipoiis2feuis7ppc2ls46s4pp2pes4@SoftX3000'',''y7wt27kk06t20exek2ft2xxyx32xezh6@SoftX3000'',''0126k263y1tx11twk26lkwe3ewxwzlx3@SoftX3000''

		AND TIEMPOS NOT LIKE ''%-%-%-%-%''

				CONVERT(INT,RIGHT(RTRIM(TIEMPOS),LEN(TIEMPOS)-CHARINDEX(''-'',TIEMPOS)))

	AND CDR_CALL_ID NOT IN (''F51FF70BCD77D677E06FE017@6c43ffffffff'',''EB0408B888B73E646348CD97@7143ffffffff'',''984714CE007F2C99D6766297@6542ffffffff'',''FACE798423FC9D6AAB0F9E17@4142ffffffff'',''738AF746F7EDCA47A6417317@6a43ffffffff''

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[spREGUL_Consolidacion_Regulados_PW_yesterday_v4]  AS
BEGIN

--DECLARACION DE VARIABLES A UTILIZAR EN EL PROCESO:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

DECLARE @FECHAINI DATETIME;
DECLARE @FECHAFIN DATETIME;
DECLARE @AYER DATE;
DECLARE @ANTES_AYER DATE;
DECLARE @CAD_SQL VARCHAR(2000);
DECLARE @CAD_SQL_NEW_MONTH VARCHAR(2000);
DECLARE @EJEC_SQL VARCHAR(8000);

--PARAMETROS PARA EL PROCESO Y REPROCESO:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

SET @AYER = GETDATE()-1
SET @ANTES_AYER = GETDATE()-2

-- PARA LA CARGA DEL DETALLE MENSUAL Y RESUMEN

SET @FECHAINI = DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, 0, GETDATE()-1), 0)
SET @FECHAFIN = GETDATE()-1

--select @FECHAINI,@FECHAFIN

--SET @FECHAINI = CAST('2022-08-01' AS DATETIME)
--SET @FECHAFIN = CAST('2022-08-31' AS DATETIME)

--SELECT @FECHAINI

DECLARE @SQL VARCHAR(8000),@PERIODO VARCHAR(6),@YESTERDAY VARCHAR(8)
DECLARE @TABLA_RESUMEN_MES VARCHAR(8000), @TABLA_FUENTE_MES_D_MENOS_1 VARCHAR(8000), @TABLA_FUENTE_MES_AURA_D_MENOS_1 VARCHAR(8000)

SET @PERIODO =	LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR,GETDATE()-5,112),6)
SET @YESTERDAY = CONVERT(VARCHAR,CAST(GETDATE()-5 AS DATE),112)
PRINT @PERIODO
PRINT @YESTERDAY

SET @TABLA_RESUMEN_MES = '[BD_REGULADOS].[dbo].[T_V2_REGULADOS_PW_'+@PERIODO+']'


--SET @TABLA_FUENTE_MES_D_MENOS_1 = '[172.30.249.167].[Repo_Contactos].[dbo].[T_DETALLE_INFOMART_202212]'
--SET @TABLA_FUENTE_MES_D_MENOS_1 = '[172.30.249.167].[Repo_Contactos].[dbo].[T_DETALLE_INFOMART_MES]' --mes actual


IF(
	(select top 1 LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR,CAST(LEFT([HANDLING ATTEMPT START],10) AS DATE),112),6)
		from [172.30.249.167].[Repo_Contactos].[dbo].[T_DETALLE_INFOMART_MES])
						= @PERIODO 
	) 
		BEGIN
			SET @TABLA_FUENTE_MES_D_MENOS_1 = '[172.30.249.167].[Repo_Contactos].[dbo].[T_DETALLE_INFOMART_MES]' --mes actual
	END
				
ELSE
	  BEGIN
			SET @TABLA_FUENTE_MES_D_MENOS_1 = '[172.30.249.167].[Repo_Contactos].[dbo].[T_DETALLE_INFOMART_'+@PERIODO+']'
	END
	
IF(
	(select top 1 LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR,CAST(LEFT(CDR_START_DATETIME,10) AS DATE),112),6)
		from [172.30.249.167].[Repo_Contact_Center].[dbo].[T_DETALLE_CDR_LN_MES])
						= @PERIODO 
	) 
		BEGIN
			SET @TABLA_FUENTE_MES_AURA_D_MENOS_1 = '[172.30.249.167].[Repo_Contact_Center].[dbo].[T_DETALLE_CDR_LN_MES]' --mes actual
	END
				
ELSE
	  BEGIN
			SET @TABLA_FUENTE_MES_AURA_D_MENOS_1 = '[172.30.249.167].[Repo_Contact_Center].[dbo].[T_DETALLE_CDR_LN_'+@PERIODO+']'
	END
--CARGA DEL IH DEL MES

IF  NOT EXISTS(SELECT name FROM BD_REGULADOS.dbo.sysobjects WHERE name ='T_V2_REGULADOS_PW_'+ @PERIODO AND TYPE='U')
BEGIN
				SET @CAD_SQL_NEW_MONTH = 'SELECT A.* INTO '+@TABLA_RESUMEN_MES+'
								FROM [BD_REGULADOS].dbo.[T_V2_REGULADOS_PW_'+LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR,DATEADD(MM,-1,CAST(@PERIODO+'01' AS DATE)),112),6)+'] A
								WHERE 1=2'
				EXEC(@CAD_SQL_NEW_MONTH)
END

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
				SET @EJEC_SQL='
				TRUNCATE TABLE [BD_REGULADOS].dbo.T_V2_TEMPORAL_REGULADOS_PW
				'
				EXEC(@EJEC_SQL)

				SET @EJEC_SQL='INSERT INTO [BD_REGULADOS].dbo.T_V2_TEMPORAL_REGULADOS_PW
				([Interaction ID],[Interaction Handling Attempt ID],[MARCACION_IVR],[Service Type],[TO],[NOMBRE_PROGRAMA],[FECHA]
					,[Handling Attempt Start],[NEGOCIO],[GRUPO_RO],[GRUPO_AVH2],[Handling Resource Type],[Service Subtype]
					,[ID],[ATENDIDAS],[MENOR_20],[Num_Cat],[Last VQueue],COD_QUEUE
				)
				SELECT 
				 TA.[Interaction ID]
				,TA.[Interaction Handling Attempt ID]
				,TA.MARCACION_IVR 
				,TA.[Service Type]
				,TA.[TO]

				, CASE WHEN Q.PROG_NOMBRE IN (''Pgr Especializado TEC FIJ'',''Pgr Neg Top TEC FIJ'',''Pgr VUS Masivo FIJ'',''Pgr Neg Clasico TEC FIJ'') THEN ''SPEEDY''
					   WHEN Q.PROG_NOMBRE IN (''Pgr Movistar1 FIJ'') THEN ''MOVISTAR 1''
					   WHEN Q.PROG_NOMBRE IN (''Pgr Television FIJ'',''Pgr Convergente FIJ'') THEN ''MOVISTAR TV''
					   WHEN Q.PROG_NOMBRE IN (''Pgr Basica 102'') THEN ''BASICA 102''
					   WHEN Q.PROG_NOMBRE = ''Pgr Especializado FIJ'' AND Q.CDN_CUBO = ''RESF_ESP_IVRRECA'' THEN ''Pgr Cable Comercial FIJ''
					   WHEN Q.PROG_NOMBRE = ''Pgr Especializado FIJ'' AND Q.CDN_CUBO = ''RESF_ESP_IVRREIN'' THEN ''Pgr Internet Comercial FIJ''                                      
					   WHEN Q.PROG_NOMBRE = ''Pgr Especializado FIJ'' AND Q.CDN_CUBO = ''RESF_ESP_IVRRELI'' THEN ''Pgr Linea Comercial FIJ''                                      
					   ELSE Q.PROG_NOMBRE
				  END NOMBRE_PROGRAMA

				, CAST(TA.DIA AS DATE) FECHA
				, [Handling Attempt Start]
				, REG_NEGOCIO AS NEGOCIO

				,  CASE WHEN Q.PROG_NOMBRE IN (''Pgr Television FIJ'',''Pgr Convergente FIJ'',''Pgr Movistar1 FIJ'', ''Pgr Especializado TEC FIJ'',
												 ''Pgr Neg Top TEC FIJ'',''Pgr VUS Masivo FIJ'',''Pgr Neg Clasico TEC FIJ'') THEN ''Tecnico''
					   WHEN Q.PROG_NOMBRE IN (''Pgr Cable Comercial FIJ'',''Pgr Internet Comercial FIJ'') THEN ''Comercial''
					   WHEN Q.PROG_NOMBRE = ''Pgr Especializado FIJ'' AND Q.CDN_CUBO = ''RESF_ESP_IVRRECA'' THEN ''Comercial''
					   WHEN Q.PROG_NOMBRE = ''Pgr Especializado FIJ'' AND Q.CDN_CUBO = ''RESF_ESP_IVRREIN'' THEN ''Comercial''
					   WHEN Q.PROG_NOMBRE IN (''Linea 104'') THEN ''Tecnico''
				  END GRUPO_RO

				, Q.SEGMENTO AS GRUPO_AVH2

				,[Handling Resource Type]
				,[Service Subtype] 
				,ID
				,CASE WHEN TA.[Handling Resource Type] = ''Agent'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS ATENDIDAS 
				,CASE WHEN TA.[Handling Resource Type] = ''Agent'' and CONVERT(INT,TA.[Routing Point Time]) < 21 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS MENOR_20
				,Corte_Agente Num_Cat
				,TA.[Last VQueue]
				,TA.COD_QUEUE
				FROM 
				(
				SELECT
				ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.[Interaction ID] ORDER BY (a.[Handling Attempt Start]) ASC) AS ID
				,CASE   WHEN a.[TO] IN (''0117001002'',''0117001003'',''0117001004'',''0117001068'',''0117001116'',''0117001092'',''0117001079'') THEN ''102''
						--WHEN a.[Service Type] LIKE ''102%'' THEN ''102''
						WHEN a.[TO] IN (''0117001015'', ''0117001357'') THEN ''080010672''
						 ELSE ''104'' END MARCACION_IVR
				,  CASE WHEN a.[TO] IN (''0117001002'',''0117001003'',''0117001004'') THEN ''102_FIJO''
						 WHEN a.[TO] IN (''0117001068'',''0117001116'',''0117001092'',''0117001079'') THEN ''102_MOVIL''
						ELSE a.[Service Type] END AS [Service Type]
				,A.[TO]
				,TB.REG_NEGOCIO
				,a.[Interaction ID]
				,a.[Interaction Handling Attempt ID]
				,a.[Handling Resource Type]
				,a.[Routing Point Time]
				,a.[Service Subtype] 
				,SUBSTRING(a.[Last VQueue], 3, 8) AS COD_QUEUE
				,a.[Last VQueue]
				,LEFT(a.[Handling Attempt Start],10) AS DIA
				,[Handling Attempt Start]
				,CASE WHEN a.[Stop Action] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE A.[Stop Action] end Corte_Agente
				FROM
	            --[BD_DETALLE_LLAMADAS].[dbo].[T_DETALLE_INFOMART_'+ LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR,@FECHAINI,112),6) +'] a WITH (NOLOCK)				
				'+@TABLA_FUENTE_MES_D_MENOS_1+' A WITH (NOLOCK)	
				INNER JOIN [BD_REGULADOS].[dbo].[T_LISTADO_IVR_VAL_2] TB WITH (NOLOCK) -- SE AÑADE DESDE 202006--SE INSERTÓ STARGLOBAL DESDE FEB 2021
				ON A.[SERVICE TYPE] = TB.REG_GRUPO_IVR
				WHERE
				a.[Interaction Type] = ''Inbound''
				AND          a.[Media Type] = ''Voice''
				AND          a.[Handling Resource Type] IN(''Agent'', ''RoutingPoint'')
				AND          a.[Last VQueue] <> ''NONE'' 

				) TA 
				LEFT JOIN (SELECT
							C.COLA_COD
							, C.CDN_CUBO
							, P.PROG_NOMBRE
							, C.SKILL
							, N.NEG_NOMBRE as NEGOCIO
							, C.FECHA_INICIO AS FECHA_INICIO_COLA
							, C.FECHA_FIN AS FECHA_FIN_COLA
							, P.SEG_NOMBRE SEGMENTO
							FROM [BD_METRICAS_CONTACT_CENTER].[dbo].[T_DIM_COLA] C
							LEFT JOIN [BD_METRICAS_CONTACT_CENTER].[dbo].[T_DIM_PROGRAMA] P ON P.PROG_ID = C.PROG_ID
							LEFT JOIN [BD_METRICAS_CONTACT_CENTER].[dbo].[T_DIM_NEGOCIO] N ON N.NEG_ID = C.NEG_ID
							) Q ON Q.COLA_COD = TA.COD_QUEUE
							AND CAST(TA.DIA AS DATE) >= Q.FECHA_INICIO_COLA
							AND CAST(TA.DIA AS DATE) <= Q.FECHA_FIN_COLA
				
						
				'
				EXEC (@EJEC_SQL)

--==============================================================FLAG_IVRAPPLICATION=============================================================================

SET @EJEC_SQL='
			UPDATE A
			SET A.FLAG_IVRAPPLICATION=''X''
			FROM BD_REGULADOS.dbo.T_V2_TEMPORAL_REGULADOS_PW A
			LEFT JOIN (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY B.[Interaction ID] ORDER BY B.[Handling Attempt Start] DESC) AS [ID]
							,B.[Interaction ID],B.[Interaction Handling Attempt ID]
						FROM '+@TABLA_FUENTE_MES_D_MENOS_1+'  B WITH (NOLOCK)

							INNER JOIN BD_REGULADOS.dbo.T_V2_TEMPORAL_REGULADOS_PW A
								ON A.[Interaction ID]=B.[Interaction ID] AND A.ID=1
									AND B.[Handling Attempt Start]<=A.[Handling AttempT Start]
						WHERE B.[Handling Resource Type]=''IVRApplication'') B
				ON A.[Interaction ID]=B.[Interaction ID]
			WHERE --A.ID=1 AND   -- TODOS LOS REGISTROS POR INTERACTION_ID
					B.[Interaction ID] IS NOT NULL
	
				'
				EXEC (@EJEC_SQL)

-- PROCESO: ACTUALIZAR INTENCIONES DE RECLAMOS (RECLAMOS + SAR + TC)
-- ETL:		Reclamos_SAR_TC
-- PAQUETE: INTENCIONES_RECLAMOS.dtsx

--EXEC CALIDAD.DBO.CONSOLIDACION_INTENCIONES_RECLAMOS
------------------------------------------------------------

CREATE procedure CONSOLIDACION_INTENCIONES_RECLAMOS
AS
BEGIN


SET NOCOUNT ON;

DECLARE @MesesAReprocesar INT;
DECLARE @FechaInicio DATE;
DECLARE @PeriodoInicio VARCHAR(6);

------------------------------------------------------------
-- 1️⃣ DEFINIR MESES A REPROCESAR
------------------------------------------------------------

IF DAY(GETDATE()) = 1
    SET @MesesAReprocesar = 3;   -- Cambio de mes
ELSE
    SET @MesesAReprocesar = 2;   -- Proceso normal

-- Primer día del mes actual
DECLARE @PrimerDiaMesActual DATE =
DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1);

-- Fecha inicio dinámica
SET @FechaInicio = DATEADD(MONTH, -@MesesAReprocesar, @PrimerDiaMesActual);

SET @PeriodoInicio = LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), @FechaInicio, 112), 6);

PRINT 'Se reprocesará desde periodo: ' + @PeriodoInicio;

------------------------------------------------------------
-- 2️⃣ ELIMINAR INFORMACIÓN DEL RANGO
------------------------------------------------------------

DELETE FROM CALIDAD.DBO.RECLAMOS_CONSOLIDADO
WHERE PERIODO_RECLAMO >= @PeriodoInicio;

------------------------------------------------------------
-- 3️⃣ INSERTAR INFORMACIÓN NUEVA
------------------------------------------------------------
INSERT INTO CALIDAD.DBO.RECLAMOS_CONSOLIDADO
(
 NUMERO_RECLAMO,
 PERIODO_RECLAMO,
 FECHA_RECLAMO,
 FECHA_LIQUIDACION,
 AGRUPADO_CLUSTER,
 CALC_TIPO_RECLAMO,
 NEGOCIO,
 MOT_N1,
 MOT_N2,
 MOT_N3,
 CALC_ESTADO_RECLAMO,
 CALC_LIQ_RESULTADO,
 CALC_IMPORTE_RECLAMADO,
 CALC_IMPORTE_LIQUIDADO,
 FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 TELEFONO,
 NUMERO_DOCUMENTO_CLIENTE,
 AGENTE_REG_LOGIN,
 AGENTE_LIQ_LOGIN,
 CALC_REGISTRO_LEGADO_CANAL,
 CALC_REGISTRO_LEGADO_AREA,
 CALC_REGISTRO_LEGADO_SUB_AREA
)

SELECT 
 NUMERO_RECLAMO,
 PERIODO_RECLAMO,
 FECHA_RECLAMO,
 FECHA_LIQUIDACION,
 AGRUPADO_CLUSTER,
 CALC_TIPO_RECLAMO,
 NEGOCIO,
 MOT_N1,
 MOT_N2,
 MOT_N3,
 CALC_ESTADO_RECLAMO,
 CALC_LIQ_RESULTADO,
 CALC_IMPORTE_RECLAMADO,
 CALC_IMPORTE_LIQUIDADO,
 FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 TELEFONO,
 NUMERO_DOCUMENTO_CLIENTE,
 AGENTE_REG_LOGIN,
 AGENTE_LIQ_LOGIN,
 CALC_REGISTRO_LEGADO_CANAL,
 CALC_REGISTRO_LEGADO_AREA,
 CALC_REGISTRO_LEGADO_SUB_AREA
FROM
(
	SELECT 
	 NUMERO_RECLAMO,
	 LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR,FECHA_RECLAMO,112),6) AS PERIODO_RECLAMO,
	 FECHA_RECLAMO,
	 FECHA_LIQUIDACION,
	 AGRUPADO_CLUSTER,
	 CALC_TIPO_RECLAMO,
	 CALC_NEGOCIO AS NEGOCIO,
	 MOT_N1,
	 MOT_N2,
	 MOTIVO_3_REPORTE_PO AS MOT_N3,
	 CALC_ESTADO_RECLAMO,
	 CALC_LIQ_RESULTADO,
	 CALC_IMPORTE_RECLAMADO,
	 CALC_IMPORTE_LIQUIDADO,
	 COD_CUENTA_FINANCIERA AS FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_KEY,
	 TELEFONO,
	 NUMERO_DOCUMENTO_CLIENTE,
	 AGENTE_REG_LOGIN,
	 AGENTE_LIQ_LOGIN,
	 CALC_REGISTRO_LEGADO_CANAL,
	 CALC_REGISTRO_LEGADO_AREA,
	 CALC_REGISTRO_LEGADO_SUB_AREA
	FROM CALIDAD.DBO.REPORTE_MOTIVOS_CONSOLIDADO
	WHERE FECHA_RECLAMO >= @FechaInicio

	UNION ALL

	SELECT 
	 NUMERO_RECLAMO,
	 LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR,CALC_FECHA_RECLAMO,112),6) AS PERIODO_RECLAMO,
	 CALC_FECHA_RECLAMO AS FECHA_RECLAMO,
	 FECHA_LIQUIDACION,
	 AGRUPADO_CLUSTER,
	 CALC_CLUSTER_RECLAMO AS CALC_TIPO_RECLAMO,
	 CALC_NEGOCIO AS NEGOCIO,
	 MOTIVO1 AS MOT_N1,
	 MOTIVO2 AS MOT_N2,
	 MOTIVO_3_FINAL AS MOT_N3,
	 CALC_ESTADO_RECLAMO,
	 CALC_LIQ_RESULTADO,
	 CALC_IMPORTE_RECLAMADO,
	 CALC_IMPORTE_LIQUIDADO,
	 COD_CUENTA_FINANCIERA AS FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_KEY,
	 TELEFONO,
	 NULL AS NUMERO_DOCUMENTO_CLIENTE,
	 AGENTE_REG_LOGIN,
	 AGENTE_REG_LOGIN AS AGENTE_LIQ_LOGIN,
	 CALC_REGISTRO_LEGADO_CANAL,
	 CALC_REGISTRO_LEGADO_AREA,
	 CALC_REGISTRO_LEGADO_SUB_AREA
	FROM CALIDAD.DBO.BASE_SAR_TC_1ERA_LINEA
	WHERE CALC_FECHA_RECLAMO >= @FechaInicio
) B

------------------------------------------------------------
-- 4️⃣ UPDATES (SOLO RANGO REPROCESADO)
------------------------------------------------------------

-- Documento cliente
UPDATE A
SET A.NUMERO_DOCUMENTO_CLIENTE = B.NUMERO_DOCUMENTO_CLIENTE
FROM CALIDAD.DBO.RECLAMOS_CONSOLIDADO A
INNER JOIN CALIDAD.DBO.BASE_AMDOCS_RECLAMOS_CALCULADO B
	ON A.NUMERO_RECLAMO = B.NUMERO_RECLAMO
WHERE A.AGRUPADO_CLUSTER IN ('SAR - FACTURACION','TRAT. 1RA LINEA')
AND ISNULL(A.NUMERO_DOCUMENTO_CLIENTE,'')=''
AND ISNULL(B.NUMERO_DOCUMENTO_CLIENTE,'')<>''
AND A.PERIODO_RECLAMO >= @PeriodoInicio


-- Parche tratamiento comercial
UPDATE A
SET MOT_N3='Otros Motivos'
FROM CALIDAD.DBO.RECLAMOS_CONSOLIDADO A
WHERE MOT_N3='Tratamiento Comercial'
AND A.PERIODO_RECLAMO >= @PeriodoInicio


-- Teléfono consolidado
UPDATE A
SET TELEFONO_CONSOLIDADO =
CASE 
	WHEN ISNULL(A.NUMERO_DOCUMENTO_CLIENTE,'')=''
	THEN A.TELEFONO
	ELSE A.NUMERO_DOCUMENTO_CLIENTE
END
FROM CALIDAD.DBO.RECLAMOS_CONSOLIDADO A
WHERE A.PERIODO_RECLAMO >= @PeriodoInicio


-- Frente y ruta
UPDATE A
SET 
 FRENTE = B.FRENTE2,
 RUTA_RECLAMO = B.[MOTIVO AGRUPADO]
FROM CALIDAD.DBO.RECLAMOS_CONSOLIDADO A
INNER JOIN CALIDAD_CRUCES.DBO.GMC_CATALOGO_MOTIVOS_FRENTE B
	ON A.MOT_N3 = B.Motivo
	AND A.NEGOCIO = B.Negocio
WHERE A.PERIODO_RECLAMO >= @PeriodoInicio


-- Segmentación
UPDATE A
SET SEGMENTO_VALOR_CLIENTE = B.SEGMENTACION
FROM CALIDAD.DBO.RECLAMOS_CONSOLIDADO A
INNER JOIN CALIDAD_CRUCES.dbo.ESCM_PLANTA_VALOR_2026 B
	ON A.NUMERO_DOCUMENTO_CLIENTE = B.NRO_DOCUMENTO
WHERE A.PERIODO_RECLAMO >= @PeriodoInicio


-- No segmentados
UPDATE A
SET SEGMENTO_VALOR_CLIENTE = 'NO SEGMENTADO'
FROM CALIDAD.DBO.RECLAMOS_CONSOLIDADO A
WHERE ISNULL(SEGMENTO_VALOR_CLIENTE,'')=''
AND A.PERIODO_RECLAMO >= @PeriodoInicio;

PRINT 'Proceso finalizado correctamente.'



END

CREATE PROCEDURE [catalog].[add_data_tap]
        @execution_id             bigint,
        @task_package_path        nvarchar(MAX),
        @dataflow_path_id_string  nvarchar(4000),
        @data_filename            nvarchar(4000),
        @max_rows                 int = null,
        @data_tap_id              bigint = NULL OUTPUT
AS
    SET NOCOUNT ON
    
    
    DECLARE @caller_id     int
    DECLARE @caller_name   [internal].[adt_sname]
    DECLARE @caller_sid    [internal].[adt_sid]
    DECLARE @suser_name    [internal].[adt_sname]
    DECLARE @suser_sid     [internal].[adt_sid]
    
    EXECUTE AS CALLER
        EXEC [internal].[get_user_info]
            @caller_name OUTPUT,
            @caller_sid OUTPUT,
            @suser_name OUTPUT,
            @suser_sid OUTPUT,
            @caller_id OUTPUT;
          
          
        IF(
            EXISTS(SELECT [name]
                    FROM sys.server_principals
                    WHERE [sid] = @suser_sid AND [type] = 'S')  
            OR
            EXISTS(SELECT [name]
                    FROM sys.database_principals
                    WHERE ([sid] = @caller_sid AND [type] = 'S')) 
            )
        BEGIN
            RAISERROR(27123, 16, 1) WITH NOWAIT
            RETURN 1
        END
    REVERT
    
    IF(
            EXISTS(SELECT [name]
                    FROM sys.server_principals
                    WHERE [sid] = @suser_sid AND [type] = 'S')  
            OR
            EXISTS(SELECT [name]
                    FROM sys.database_principals
                    WHERE ([sid] = @caller_sid AND [type] = 'S')) 
            )
    BEGIN
            RAISERROR(27123, 16, 1) WITH NOWAIT
            RETURN 1
    END
    
    IF [internal].[check_permission] 
    (
        4,
        @execution_id,
        2
    ) = 0
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR(27143, 16, 5, @execution_id) WITH NOWAIT
        RETURN 1      
    END   

    DECLARE @rowsNum int
    IF (@max_rows is null or @max_rows < 0)
    BEGIN
		SELECT @rowsNum = -1
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
		SELECT @rowsNum = @max_rows
    END

    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT [execution_id] FROM [internal].[execution_info] WHERE [execution_id] = @execution_id)
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR(27103 , 16, 1, @execution_id) WITH NOWAIT
        RETURN 1 
    END

    DECLARE @execution_status int
    SELECT @execution_status = [status] FROM [internal].[operations] WHERE [operation_id] = @execution_id
    IF (@execution_status != 1)
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR(27212, 16, 1) WITH NOWAIT
        RETURN 1 
    END

    IF EXISTS (SELECT [data_tap_id] 
	           FROM [internal].[execution_data_taps] 
	           WHERE [execution_id] = @execution_id 
	               AND [package_path] = @task_package_path COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS
	               AND dataflow_path_id_string = @dataflow_path_id_string COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS) 
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR(27213, 16, 1, @execution_id) WITH NOWAIT
        RETURN 1 
    END

    INSERT INTO [internal].[execution_data_taps]
           ([execution_id],
            [package_path],
            [dataflow_path_id_string],
            [max_rows],
            [filename])
     VALUES(@execution_id,                             
            @task_package_path,                                                            
            @dataflow_path_id_string,
            @rowsNum,
            @data_filename
           )
    SET @data_tap_id = SCOPE_IDENTITY()
    RETURN 0

CREATE PROCEDURE [catalog].[check_schema_version]
		@use32bitruntime		smallint			
AS
	SET NOCOUNT ON

	
	IF (@use32bitruntime IS NULL)
	BEGIN
        RAISERROR(27138, 16 , 4) WITH NOWAIT
        RETURN 1
    END

    
    
    DECLARE @caller_id     int
    DECLARE @caller_name   [internal].[adt_sname]
    DECLARE @caller_sid    [internal].[adt_sid]
    DECLARE @suser_name    [internal].[adt_sname]
    DECLARE @suser_sid     [internal].[adt_sid]
    
    EXECUTE AS CALLER
        EXEC [internal].[get_user_info]
            @caller_name OUTPUT,
            @caller_sid OUTPUT,
            @suser_name OUTPUT,
            @suser_sid OUTPUT,
            @caller_id OUTPUT;
          
          
        IF(
            EXISTS(SELECT [name]
                    FROM sys.server_principals
                    WHERE [sid] = @suser_sid AND [type] = 'S')  
            OR
            EXISTS(SELECT [name]
                    FROM sys.database_principals
                    WHERE ([sid] = @caller_sid AND [type] = 'S')) 
            )
        BEGIN
            RAISERROR(27123, 16, 1) WITH NOWAIT
            RETURN 1
        END
    REVERT
    
    IF(
            EXISTS(SELECT [name]
                    FROM sys.server_principals
                    WHERE [sid] = @suser_sid AND [type] = 'S')  
            OR
            EXISTS(SELECT [name]
                    FROM sys.database_principals
                    WHERE ([sid] = @caller_sid AND [type] = 'S')) 
            )
    BEGIN
            RAISERROR(27123, 16, 1) WITH NOWAIT
            RETURN 1
    END

    DECLARE @created_time  DATETIMEOFFSET
    DECLARE @return_value  int
    DECLARE @operation_id  bigint
    DECLARE @result        bit

	BEGIN TRY
        SET @created_time = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET() 
        
        EXEC @return_value = [internal].[insert_operation] 
                        700,  
                        @created_time,          
                        NULL,                   
                        NULL,                   
                        NULL,                   
                        5,    
                        @created_time,          
                        null,                   
                        @caller_sid,            
                        @caller_name,           
                        null,                   
                        null,                   
                        null,                   
                        @operation_id OUTPUT  
        IF @return_value <> 0
            RETURN 1;
        
        
        EXEC @return_value = [internal].[init_object_permissions] 4, @operation_id, @caller_id
                      
        IF @return_value <> 0
        BEGIN
            
            RAISERROR(27153, 16, 1) WITH NOWAIT
            RETURN 1
        END 
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        UPDATE [internal].[operations] SET 
            [end_time]  = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET(),
            [status]    = 4
            WHERE operation_id = @operation_id;
        THROW           
    END CATCH

	if (@operation_id IS NULL)
	BEGIN
		
		RETURN 1
	END

	BEGIN TRY	
		DECLARE	@serverBuild nvarchar(1024),
				@schemaVersion int,
				@schemaBuild nvarchar(1024),
				@assemblyBuild nvarchar(1024),
				@componentVersion nvarchar(1024),
				@compatibilityStatus smallint

		EXEC	@return_value = [internal].[check_schema_version_internal]
									@operationId = @operation_id,
									@use32bitruntime = @use32bitruntime,
									@serverBuild = @serverBuild OUTPUT,
									@schemaVersion = @schemaVersion OUTPUT,
									@schemaBuild = @schemaBuild OUTPUT,
									@assemblyBuild = @assemblyBuild OUTPUT,
									@componentVersion = @componentVersion OUTPUT,
									@compatibilityStatus = @compatibilityStatus OUTPUT
		
		
		if @return_value <> 0
			RETURN 1

		
        UPDATE [internal].[operations] SET 
            [end_time]  = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET(),
            [status]    = 7
            WHERE operation_id    = @operation_id; 

		
		SELECT	@serverBuild as N'SERVER_BUILD',
				@schemaVersion as N'SCHEMA_VERSION',
				@schemaBuild as N'SCHEMA_BUILD',
				@assemblyBuild as N'ASSEMBLY_BUILD',
				@componentVersion as N'SHARED_COMPONENT_VERSION',
				@compatibilityStatus as N'COMPATIBILITY_STATUS'
	END TRY
	BEGIN CATCH
		
	    UPDATE [internal].[operations] 
        SET [status] = 4,
            [end_time]  = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET()
        WHERE [operation_id] = @operation_id;
		THROW
	END CATCH

	RETURN 0

CREATE PROCEDURE [catalog].[clear_object_parameter_value]
        @folder_name            nvarchar(128),
        @project_name           nvarchar(128),
        @object_type            smallint,
        @object_name            nvarchar(260) = NULL,
        @parameter_name         nvarchar(128)
AS
    SET NOCOUNT ON
     
    DECLARE @result bit
    DECLARE @parameter_id bigint
    
    
    DECLARE @caller_id     int
    DECLARE @caller_name   [internal].[adt_sname]
    DECLARE @caller_sid    [internal].[adt_sid]
    DECLARE @suser_name    [internal].[adt_sname]
    DECLARE @suser_sid     [internal].[adt_sid]
    
    EXECUTE AS CALLER
        EXEC [internal].[get_user_info]
            @caller_name OUTPUT,
            @caller_sid OUTPUT,
            @suser_name OUTPUT,
            @suser_sid OUTPUT,
            @caller_id OUTPUT;
          
          
        IF(
            EXISTS(SELECT [name]
                    FROM sys.server_principals
                    WHERE [sid] = @suser_sid AND [type] = 'S')  
            OR
            EXISTS(SELECT [name]
                    FROM sys.database_principals
                    WHERE ([sid] = @caller_sid AND [type] = 'S')) 
            )
        BEGIN
            RAISERROR(27123, 16, 1) WITH NOWAIT
            RETURN 1
        END
    REVERT
    
    IF(
            EXISTS(SELECT [name]
                    FROM sys.server_principals
                    WHERE [sid] = @suser_sid AND [type] = 'S')  
            OR
            EXISTS(SELECT [name]
                    FROM sys.database_principals
                    WHERE ([sid] = @caller_sid AND [type] = 'S')) 
            )
    BEGIN
            RAISERROR(27123, 16, 1) WITH NOWAIT
            RETURN 1
    END
       
    IF (@folder_name IS NULL OR @project_name IS NULL 
            OR @parameter_name IS NULL )
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR(27138, 16 , 6) WITH NOWAIT 
        RETURN 1     
    END   
    
    IF @object_type NOT IN (20, 30)
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR(27101, 16 , 1, N'object_type') WITH NOWAIT
        RETURN 1;
    END
    
    IF (@object_type = 30 AND @object_name IS NULL)
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR(27138, 16 , 6) WITH NOWAIT 
        RETURN 1     
    END
    
    
    SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL SERIALIZABLE
    
    
    
    DECLARE @tran_count INT = @@TRANCOUNT;
    DECLARE @savepoint_name NCHAR(32);
    IF @tran_count > 0
    BEGIN
        SET @savepoint_name = REPLACE(CONVERT(NCHAR(36), NEWID()), N'-', N'');
        SAVE TRANSACTION @savepoint_name;
    END
    ELSE
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;                                                                                        
    
    BEGIN TRY
    
        
    DECLARE @project_id bigint;
    EXECUTE AS CALLER
        SET @project_id = (SELECT projs.[project_id]
                                FROM [catalog].[projects] projs INNER JOIN [catalog].[folders] fld
                                ON projs.[folder_id] = fld.[folder_id]
                                AND projs.[name] = @project_name
                                AND fld.name = @folder_name);
    REVERT
    IF @project_id IS NULL
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR(27109 , 16 , 1, @project_name) WITH NOWAIT
    END
    EXECUTE AS CALLER
        SET @result = [internal].[check_permission]
        (
            2,
            @project_id,
            2
         )
    REVERT
    IF @result = 0
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR(27109 , 16 , 1, @project_name) WITH NOWAIT
    END
        
        IF @object_type = 20  
        BEGIN
            SELECT @parameter_id = [parameter_id]
                FROM [catalog].[object_parameters]
                WHERE [project_id] = @project_id AND [object_type] = @object_type
                AND [parameter_name] = @parameter_name COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS
        END
        ELSE IF @object_type = 30  
        BEGIN
            SELECT @parameter_id = [parameter_id]
                FROM [catalog].[object_parameters]
                WHERE [project_id] = @project_id AND [object_type] = @object_type
                AND [parameter_name] = @parameter_name COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CS_AS
                AND [object_name] = @object_name
        END
        
        IF @parameter_id IS NULL
        BEGIN
            RAISERROR( 27106 , 16 , 1, @parameter_name) WITH NOWAIT     
        END        

        UPDATE [internal].[object_parameters]
            SET [default_value] = NULL,
                [sensitive_default_value] = NULL,
                [base_data_type] = NULL,
                [value_type] = 'V',
                [value_set] = 0,
                [referenced_variable_name] = NULL
        WHERE parameter_id = @parameter_id
        IF @@ROWCOUNT <> 1
        BEGIN
            RAISERROR(27112, 16, 1, N'object_parameters') WITH NOWAIT
        END       
                  
        
        IF @tran_count = 0
            COMMIT TRANSACTION;                                                                                 
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        
        IF @tran_count = 0 
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        ELSE IF XACT_STATE() <> -1
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION @savepoint_name;                                                                              
              
        THROW 
    END CATCH
    
    RETURN 0

CREATE PROCEDURE [catalog].[configure_catalog] 
        @property_name           nvarchar(255), 
        @property_value          nvarchar(255)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON
    
    
    
    DECLARE @caller_id     int
    DECLARE @caller_name   [internal].[adt_sname]
    DECLARE @caller_sid    [internal].[adt_sid]
    DECLARE @suser_name    [internal].[adt_sname]
    DECLARE @suser_sid     [internal].[adt_sid]
    
    EXECUTE AS CALLER
        EXEC [internal].[get_user_info]
            @caller_name OUTPUT,
            @caller_sid OUTPUT,
            @suser_name OUTPUT,
            @suser_sid OUTPUT,
            @caller_id OUTPUT;
          
          
        IF(
            EXISTS(SELECT [name]
                    FROM sys.server_principals
                    WHERE [sid] = @suser_sid AND [type] = 'S')  
            OR
            EXISTS(SELECT [name]
                    FROM sys.database_principals
                    WHERE ([sid] = @caller_sid AND [type] = 'S')) 
            )
        BEGIN
            RAISERROR(27123, 16, 1) WITH NOWAIT
            RETURN 1
        END
    REVERT
    
    IF(
            EXISTS(SELECT [name]
                    FROM sys.server_principals
                    WHERE [sid] = @suser_sid AND [type] = 'S')  
            OR
            EXISTS(SELECT [name]
                    FROM sys.database_principals
                    WHERE ([sid] = @caller_sid AND [type] = 'S')) 
            )
    BEGIN
            RAISERROR(27123, 16, 1) WITH NOWAIT
            RETURN 1
    END

    EXECUTE AS CALLER
        IF ((IS_MEMBER('ssis_admin') <> 1) AND (IS_SRVROLEMEMBER('sysadmin') <> 1))
            BEGIN
               RAISERROR(27140, 16, 1, N'ssis_admin', N'sysadmin') WITH NOWAIT
               RETURN 1 
            END
    REVERT
    
    IF @property_name IS NULL OR @property_value IS NULL
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR(27138, 16 , 6) WITH NOWAIT 
        RETURN 1 
    END
    
    IF @property_name NOT IN ('ENCRYPTION_ALGORITHM', 'RETENTION_WINDOW', 
            'MAX_PROJECT_VERSIONS', 'VERSION_CLEANUP_ENABLED', 'OPERATION_CLEANUP_ENABLED', 'SERVER_LOGGING_LEVEL','SERVER_OPERATION_ENCRYPTION_LEVEL')
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR(27101, 16 , 1, N'property_name') WITH NOWAIT
        RETURN 1
    END
    
    DECLARE @operation_id       bigint
    DECLARE @return_value       int
    DECLARE @status             int
    DECLARE @result             bit
    DECLARE @ret                int
    DECLARE @old_algorithm_name nvarchar(255)
    
    SET @result = 1
    
    INSERT INTO [internal].[operations] (
        [operation_type],
        [created_time],
        [object_type],
        [object_id],
        [object_name] ,
        [status], 
        [start_time],
        [caller_sid], 
        [caller_name]
        )
    VALUES (
        1000,
        SYSDATETIMEOFFSET(),
        NULL,
        NULL,
        @property_name,
        2,
        SYSDATETIMEOFFSET(), 
        @caller_sid,            
        @caller_name  
        )
        
    IF @@ROWCOUNT <> 1
    BEGIN
      RETURN 1;
    END

    SET @operation_id = SCOPE_IDENTITY();
    
    EXECUTE AS CALLER
        EXEC @return_value = [internal].[init_object_permissions] 
                    4, @operation_id, @caller_id 
    REVERT            
    IF @return_value <> 0
    BEGIN
        
        RAISERROR(27153, 16, 1) WITH NOWAIT
        RETURN 1
    END   
    
    
    IF (UPPER(@property_name) = 'ENCRYPTION_ALGORITHM')
    BEGIN
                
        
    SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL SERIALIZABLE
    
    
    
    DECLARE @tran_count INT = @@TRANCOUNT;
    DECLARE @savepoint_name NCHAR(32);
    IF @tran_count > 0
    BEGIN
        SET @savepoint_name = REPLACE(CONVERT(NCHAR(36), NEWID()), N'-', N'');
        SAVE TRANSACTION @savepoint_name;
    END
    ELSE
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;                                                                                                  
        BEGIN TRY

            IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT [user_access] FROM sys.databases 
                WHERE name = 'SSISDB' and [user_access] = 1 )
            BEGIN
                RAISERROR(27162, 16 , 1, N'ENCRYPTION_ALGORITHM' ) WITH NOWAIT
            END
            
            SELECT @old_algorithm_name = property_value
                FROM [internal].[catalog_properties] 
                WHERE property_name = 'ENCRYPTION_ALGORITHM'
            
            SELECT @ret = [internal].[validate_encryption_algorithm](@property_value)
            IF @ret <> 0
            BEGIN
               RAISERROR(27101, 16, 12, N'property_value') WITH NOWAIT
            END
            
            
            
            EXEC @ret = [internal].[configure_environment_encryption_algorithm] @property_value, @operation_id
            IF @ret <> 0
            BEGIN
                RAISERROR (27167, 16, 1, @property_value,@property_value ) WITH NOWAIT
            END
            
            EXEC @ret = [internal].[configure_execution_encryption_algorithm] @property_value, @operation_id
            IF @ret <> 0
            BEGIN
                RAISERROR (27168,16,1, @property_value,@property_value) WITH NOWAIT
            END           
            
            EXEC @ret = [internal].[configure_project_encryption_algorithm] @property_value,@old_algorithm_name, @operation_id
            IF @ret <> 0
            BEGIN
                RAISERROR (27168,16,1, @property_value,@property_value) WITH NOWAIT
            END 
            
            
            UPDATE [internal].[catalog_properties] 
                SET property_value = @property_value
                WHERE property_name = 'ENCRYPTION_ALGORITHM'
            
        IF @tran_count = 0
            COMMIT TRANSACTION;                                                                                    
        END TRY
        BEGIN CATCH 
            
        IF @tran_count = 0 
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        ELSE IF XACT_STATE() <> -1
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION @savepoint_name;                                                                            
            UPDATE [internal].[operations] SET 
                [end_time]  = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET(),
                [status]    = 4
                WHERE operation_id    = @operation_id;
            THROW;
        END CATCH      
    END
    
    ELSE IF (UPPER(@property_name) = 'RETENTION_WINDOW')
        BEGIN
            
            BEGIN TRY
                DECLARE @retention_window INT
                SET @retention_window = CONVERT(INT, @property_value)
                
                IF @retention_window <= 0 OR @retention_window >3650
                BEGIN
                    RAISERROR(27101, 16, 14, N'property_value') WITH NOWAIT
                END
                    
                UPDATE [internal].[catalog_properties] 
                    SET property_value = @property_value
                    WHERE property_name = 'RETENTION_WINDOW'

                IF @@ROWCOUNT <> 1
                BEGIN
                    RAISERROR(27112, 16, 8, N'isserver_property') WITH NOWAIT;
                END                             
            END TRY
            BEGIN CATCH
                UPDATE [internal].[operations] SET 
                    [end_time]  = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET(),
                    [status]    = 4
                    WHERE operation_id    = @operation_id;  
                THROW;
            END CATCH
        END
    ELSE IF (UPPER(@property_name) = 'MAX_PROJECT_VERSIONS')
        BEGIN
            
            BEGIN TRY
                DECLARE @version_count INT
                SET @version_count = CONVERT(INT, @property_value)

                IF @version_count <= 0 OR @version_count > 9999
                BEGIN
                    RAISERROR(27101, 16, 16, N'property_value') WITH NOWAIT
                END
                
                UPDATE [internal].[catalog_properties] 
                    SET property_value = @property_value
                    WHERE property_name = 'MAX_PROJECT_VERSIONS'

                IF @@ROWCOUNT <> 1
                BEGIN
                    RAISERROR(27112, 16, 9, N'isserver_property') WITH NOWAIT;
                END       
            END TRY
            
            BEGIN CATCH
                UPDATE [internal].[operations] SET 
                    [end_time]  = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET(),
                    [status]    = 4
                    WHERE operation_id    = @operation_id;
                    THROW;
            END CATCH
        END
           
        ELSE IF (UPPER(@property_name) = 'OPERATION_CLEANUP_ENABLED')
        BEGIN
            
            BEGIN TRY

                IF @property_value NOT IN ('TRUE', 'FALSE')
                BEGIN
                    RAISERROR(27101, 16, 16, N'property_value') WITH NOWAIT
                END
                
                UPDATE [internal].[catalog_properties] 
                    SET property_value = @property_value
                    WHERE property_name = 'OPERATION_CLEANUP_ENABLED'

                IF @@ROWCOUNT <> 1
                BEGIN
                    RAISERROR(27112, 16, 9, N'isserver_property') WITH NOWAIT;
                END       
            END TRY
            
            BEGIN CATCH
                UPDATE [internal].[operations] SET 
                    [end_time]  = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET(),
                    [status]    = 4
                    WHERE operation_id    = @operation_id;
                    THROW;
            END CATCH
        END 

        ELSE IF (UPPER(@property_name) = 'VERSION_CLEANUP_ENABLED')
        BEGIN
            
            BEGIN TRY
            
                IF @property_value NOT IN ('TRUE', 'FALSE')
                BEGIN
                    RAISERROR(27101, 16, 16, N'property_value') WITH NOWAIT
                END
                
                UPDATE [internal].[catalog_properties] 
                    SET property_value = @property_value
                    WHERE property_name = 'VERSION_CLEANUP_ENABLED'

                IF @@ROWCOUNT <> 1
                BEGIN
                    RAISERROR(27112, 16, 9, N'isserver_property') WITH NOWAIT;
                END       
            END TRY
            
            BEGIN CATCH
                UPDATE [internal].[operations] SET 
                    [end_time]  = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET(),
                    [status]    = 4
                    WHERE operation_id    = @operation_id;
                    THROW;
            END CATCH
        END 

        ELSE IF (UPPER(@property_name) = 'SERVER_LOGGING_LEVEL')
        BEGIN
            
            BEGIN TRY
                DECLARE @server_logging_level INT
                SET @server_logging_level = CONVERT(INT, @property_value)
                IF (@server_logging_level < 0 OR @server_logging_level > 3)
                BEGIN
                    RAISERROR(27217, 16 , 1, @server_logging_level) WITH NOWAIT
                END
                    
                UPDATE [internal].[catalog_properties] 
                    SET property_value = @property_value
                    WHERE property_name = 'SERVER_LOGGING_LEVEL'

                IF @@ROWCOUNT <> 1
                BEGIN
                    RAISERROR(27112, 16, 8, N'isserver_property') WITH NOWAIT;
                END                             
            END TRY
            BEGIN CATCH
                UPDATE [internal].[operations] SET 
                    [end_time]  = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET(),
                    [status]    = 4
                    WHERE operation_id    = @operation_id;  
                THROW;
            END CATCH
        END  
        ELSE IF (UPPER(@property_name) = 'SERVER_OPERATION_ENCRYPTION_LEVEL')
        BEGIN
            SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL SERIALIZABLE
            SET @tran_count = @@TRANCOUNT;
                    
            IF @tran_count > 0
            BEGIN
                SET @savepoint_name = REPLACE(CONVERT(NCHAR(36), NEWID()), N'-', N'');
                SAVE TRANSACTION @savepoint_name;
            END
            ELSE
                BEGIN TRANSACTION;
            BEGIN TRY
                DECLARE @server_operation_encryption_level int
                DECLARE @curr_level int

                
                IF EXISTS (SELECT operation_id FROM [internal].[operations]
                        WHERE [status] IN (2, 5)
                        AND   [operation_id] <> @operation_id )
                BEGIN    
                    RAISERROR(27139, 16, 1) WITH NOWAIT
                    RETURN 1
                END

                IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT [user_access] FROM sys.databases 
                    WHERE name = 'SSISDB' and [user_access] = 1 )
                BEGIN
                    RAISERROR(27162, 16 , 1, N'SERVER_OPERATION_ENCRYPTION_LEVEL' ) WITH NOWAIT
                END

                SET @server_operation_encryption_level = CONVERT(int, @property_value)
                IF @server_operation_encryption_level NOT in (1, 2)      
                BEGIN
                    RAISERROR(27101,16,1,'propery_value')
                END

                SELECT @curr_level = CONVERT(int, property_value)
                    FROM [internal].[catalog_properties] WITH (UPDLOCK)
                    WHERE property_name = 'SERVER_OPERATION_ENCRYPTION_LEVEL'

                IF @curr_level NOT in (1, 2)         
                BEGIN
                    RAISERROR(27163    ,16,1,'SERVER_OPERATION_ENCRYPTION_LEVEL')
                END

                IF (@server_operation_encryption_level <> @curr_level) 
                BEGIN
                    IF (EXISTS(SELECT [operation_id]
                        FROM [internal].[operations]
                        WHERE operation_type = 200))
                    BEGIN
                        RAISERROR(27141, 16, 1) WITH NOWAIT;
                    END

                    UPDATE [internal].[catalog_properties] 
                        SET property_value = @property_value
                        WHERE property_name = 'SERVER_OPERATION_ENCRYPTION_LEVEL'

                    IF @@ROWCOUNT <> 1
                    BEGIN
                        RAISERROR(27112, 16, 8, N'isserver_property') WITH NOWAIT;
                    END
                END
                
        IF @tran_count = 0
            COMMIT TRANSACTION;                                                                                 
            END TRY
            BEGIN CATCH
                 
        IF @tran_count = 0 
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        ELSE IF XACT_STATE() <> -1
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION @savepoint_name;                                                                           
                UPDATE [internal].[operations] SET 
                    [end_time]  = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET(),
                    [status]    = 4
                    WHERE operation_id    = @operation_id;  
                THROW;
            END CATCH
        END
        ELSE
        BEGIN
            
            RAISERROR(27101, 16, 13, N'property_name') WITH NOWAIT
            RETURN 1  
        END
    
    UPDATE [internal].[operations] SET 
        [end_time]  = SYSDATETIMEOFFSET(),
        [status]    = 7
        WHERE operation_id    = @operation_id 
    RETURN 0          
END

CREATE FUNCTION [catalog].[dm_execution_performance_counters](@execution_id bigint = NULL)
RETURNS @ret TABLE
([execution_id] bigint,
 [counter_name] sysname,
 [counter_value] bigint)
WITH EXECUTE AS CALLER
AS
BEGIN
    IF (@execution_id IS NULL)
    BEGIN
        DECLARE @current_execution_id bigint
        DECLARE @current_execution_guid uniqueidentifier
        DECLARE execution_cursor CURSOR LOCAL
            FOR SELECT [execution_id],[dump_id] FROM [catalog].[executions] WHERE [status] = 2
        OPEN execution_cursor
        FETCH NEXT FROM execution_cursor
            INTO @current_execution_id,@current_execution_guid
        WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
        BEGIN
            IF [internal].[check_permission]
            (
              4,
              @execution_id,      
              1
            ) = 1
            BEGIN
                INSERT INTO @ret
                SELECT [execution_id] ,
                       [counter_name] ,
                       [counter_value]
                FROM [internal].[get_execution_perf_counters](@current_execution_id,@current_execution_guid)        
            END
            FETCH NEXT FROM execution_cursor
                INTO @current_execution_id,@current_execution_guid           
        END
        CLOSE execution_cursor
        DEALLOCATE execution_cursor
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
        IF [internal].[check_permission]
        (
           4,
           @execution_id,      
           1
        ) = 1
        BEGIN
            DECLARE @execution_guid uniqueidentifier
            SELECT @execution_guid = [dump_id] FROM [catalog].[executions] WHERE [execution_id] = @execution_id AND [status] = 2
            IF (@execution_guid IS NOT NULL)
            BEGIN
                INSERT INTO @ret
                SELECT [execution_id] ,
                       [counter_name] ,
                       [counter_value]
                FROM [internal].[get_execution_perf_counters](@execution_id,@execution_guid)	
            END
        END
    END
    RETURN
END

CREATE FUNCTION [catalog].[get_operation_log_size]()
RETURNS bigint
AS 
BEGIN
    DECLARE @value bigint
    DECLARE @tmp_value bigint
    
    SET @value = 0
    
    SET @tmp_value = internal.get_space_used('internal.operation_messages')
    IF(@tmp_value < 0)
    BEGIN
        RETURN -1
    END  
    SET @value = @value + @tmp_value
    
    SET @tmp_value = internal.get_space_used('internal.operations')
    IF(@tmp_value < 0)
    BEGIN
        RETURN -1
    END  
    SET @value = @value + @tmp_value
    
    SET @tmp_value = internal.get_space_used('internal.executions')
    IF(@tmp_value < 0)
    BEGIN
        RETURN -1
    END  
    SET @value = @value + @tmp_value
        SET @tmp_value = internal.get_space_used('internal.validations')
    IF(@tmp_value < 0)
    BEGIN
        RETURN -1
    END  
    SET @value = @value + @tmp_value
    
    SET @tmp_value = internal.get_space_used('internal.extended_operation_info')
    IF(@tmp_value < 0)
    BEGIN
        RETURN -1
    END  
    SET @value = @value + @tmp_value
    
    SET @tmp_value = internal.get_space_used('internal.execution_parameter_values')
    IF(@tmp_value < 0)
    BEGIN
        RETURN -1
    END  
    SET @value = @value + @tmp_value    
    
    SET @tmp_value = internal.get_space_used('internal.event_messages')
    IF(@tmp_value < 0)
    BEGIN
        RETURN -1
    END  
    SET @value = @value + @tmp_value    
    
    SET @tmp_value = internal.get_space_used('internal.event_message_context')
    IF(@tmp_value < 0)
    BEGIN
        RETURN -1
    END  
    SET @value = @value + @tmp_value    
    
    SET @tmp_value = internal.get_space_used('internal.executable_statistics')
    IF(@tmp_value < 0)
    BEGIN
        RETURN -1
    END  
    SET @value = @value + @tmp_value    
    
    SET @tmp_value = internal.get_space_used('internal.executables')
    IF(@tmp_value < 0)
    BEGIN
        RETURN -1
    END  
    SET @value = @value + @tmp_value    

    RETURN @value
END

CREATE VIEW [catalog].[effective_object_permissions]
AS

SELECT     [object_type],
           [object_id],
           [permission_type]
FROM       [internal].[current_user_object_permissions]
WHERE      [is_deny] = 0

UNION ALL

SELECT     op.[object_type],
           op.[object_id],
           CAST((op2.[permission_type] - 100) AS SmallInt) AS [permission_type]
FROM       [internal].[object_permissions] op INNER JOIN [internal].[object_folders] ofs
           ON op.[object_type] = ofs.[object_type] AND op.[object_id] = ofs.[object_id]
           INNER JOIN [internal].[current_user_object_permissions] op2 
           ON ofs.[folder_id] = op2.[object_id] AND op2.[object_type] = 1
WHERE      op2.[is_deny] = 0
           AND op2.[permission_type] > 100
           
           
           AND (     (op.[object_type] <> 3) 
                 OR (op2.[permission_type] <> 103)
               )

EXCEPT

SELECT     [object_type],
           [object_id],
           [permission_type]
FROM       [internal].[current_user_object_permissions]
WHERE      [is_deny] = 1

EXCEPT

SELECT     op.[object_type],
           op.[object_id],
           CAST((op2.[permission_type] - 100) AS SmallInt) AS [permission_type]
FROM       [internal].[object_permissions] op INNER JOIN [internal].[object_folders] ofs
           ON op.[object_type]=ofs.[object_type] and op.[object_id] = ofs.[object_id]
           INNER JOIN [internal].[current_user_object_permissions] op2 
           ON ofs.[folder_id] = op2.[object_id] AND op2.[object_type] = 1
WHERE      op2.[is_deny] = 1
           AND op2.[permission_type] > 100

([permission_type]=(104) OR [permission_type]=(103) OR [permission_type]=(102) OR [permission_type]=(101) OR [permission_type]=(100) OR [permission_type]=(4) OR [permission_type]=(2) OR [permission_type]=(1))

CREATE FUNCTION [internal].[check_permission]
(
    @object_type SMALLINT,
    @object_id BIGINT,
    @permission_type SMALLINT
)
RETURNS BIT
AS
BEGIN
    DECLARE @Result BIT
    
    IF (IS_MEMBER('ssis_admin') = 1) OR (IS_SRVROLEMEMBER('sysadmin') = 1)
        RETURN 1
    
    IF EXISTS 
    (
        SELECT [permission_type]
        FROM [catalog].[effective_object_permissions]
        WHERE 
            [object_type] = @object_type
        AND [object_id] = @object_id
        AND [permission_type] = @permission_type
    )
        SET @Result = 1
    ELSE
        SET @Result = 0
  
    RETURN @Result
END

CREATE FUNCTION [internal].[get_encryption_algorithm]()
RETURNS nvarchar(255)
AS
BEGIN
  DECLARE @value nvarchar(255)
  SELECT @value = [property_value] 
  FROM [catalog].[catalog_properties] 
  WHERE property_name = 'ENCRYPTION_ALGORITHM'
  IF @value IS NULL
      RETURN NULL
      
  DECLARE @valid INT
  SELECT @valid = [internal].[validate_encryption_algorithm](@value)
  IF @valid <> 0
      SET @value = NULL
  
  RETURN @value
END

CREATE PROC [dbo].[_____ENCUESTAS_AURA_1_SETEA_PERIODO]

-- PROCESO DESCONTINUADO (DESDE 01/04/23). YA EXISTE OTRO PROCESO ACTULIZADO PARA ENCUESTAS AURA

	@PERIODO CHAR(6) = NULL
AS BEGIN
	
	IF @PERIODO IS NULL BEGIN
	
		UPDATE TP_CALIDAD.DBO.DIAS_PROCESO_ENCUESTAS
		SET PERIODO = (
			SELECT MAX(PERIODO) FROM (
				SELECT CONVERT(CHAR(6),CONVERT(DATE,FECHA_LLAM),112) PERIODO FROM STAGE.AURA_ADAPTATIVOS_FIJA
				UNION 
				SELECT CONVERT(CHAR(6),CONVERT(DATE,FECHA_LLAM),112) PERIODO FROM STAGE.AURA_ADAPTATIVOS_MOVIL
			) A
		)
		WHERE PROCESO = 'AURA ADAPTATIVOS'
		
		UPDATE TP_CALIDAD.DBO.DIAS_PROCESO_ENCUESTAS
		SET PERIODO = (
			SELECT MAX(PERIODO) FROM (
				SELECT CONVERT(CHAR(6),CONVERT(DATE,FECHA_LLAM),112) PERIODO FROM STAGE.AURA_AUTOGESTION_FIJA
				UNION 
				SELECT CONVERT(CHAR(6),CONVERT(DATE,FECHA_LLAM),112) PERIODO FROM STAGE.AURA_AUTOGESTION_MOVIL
			) A
		)
		WHERE PROCESO = 'AURA AUTOGESTION'
		
		UPDATE TP_CALIDAD.DBO.DIAS_PROCESO_ENCUESTAS
		SET PERIODO = (
			SELECT MAX(PERIODO) FROM (
				SELECT CONVERT(CHAR(6),CONVERT(DATE,FECHA_LLAM),112) PERIODO FROM STAGE.AURA_BLOQUEOS_FIJA
				UNION 
				SELECT CONVERT(CHAR(6),CONVERT(DATE,FECHA_LLAM),112) PERIODO FROM STAGE.AURA_BLOQUEOS_MOVIL
			) A
		)
		WHERE PROCESO = 'AURA BLOQUEOS'

	END ELSE 
		UPDATE TP_CALIDAD.DBO.DIAS_PROCESO_ENCUESTAS
		SET PERIODO = @PERIODO
		WHERE PROCESO LIKE 'AURA%'
END

CREATE PROC [dbo].[ENCUESTAS_AURA_3_ACTUALIZA_DATOS] AS BEGIN

DECLARE @PERIODO CHAR(6)
DECLARE @CANT_REGISTROS INT

----------------------------------------
-- CORRECCION DE ENCUESTAS AUTOGESTION
----------------------------------------

--EXTRAE CDR_CALL_ID DE BLOQUEOS POR TRANSCRIPCION
SET @PERIODO = (SELECT TOP 1 PERIODO FROM DIAS_PROCESO_ENCUESTAS WHERE PROCESO = 'AURA AUTOGESTION')
TRUNCATE TABLE TEMP_BLOQUEOS
EXEC('
	INSERT INTO TEMP_BLOQUEOS(CDR_CALL_ID)
	SELECT CDR_CALL_ID
	FROM [172.30.249.167].REPO_LAYOUT.DBO.LYT_CONTACT_CENTER_ACCESADAS_'+@PERIODO+'
	WHERE 
	--FUERA_HORARIO
	Transcript LIKE ''%Para continuar con tu solicitud debo comunicarte con un asesor especializado, sin embargo debido al estado de emergencia el horario%''
	OR Transcript LIKE ''%Para continuar con tu solicitud debo comunicarte con un asesor especializado; sin embargo, el horario de%''
	--CAPACIDAD
	OR Transcript LIKE ''%Para continuar debo comunicarte con un asesor, sin embargo%''
	OR Transcript LIKE ''%Desc%rgala en tu celular o ingresando a nuestra web www.movistar.com.pe.%''
	OR Transcript LIKE ''%DescÃ¡rgala en tu celular o ingresando a nuestra web vedoble vedoble vedoble punto movistar punto com punto pe e.%''
')


-- AQUI PARA VALIDAR QUE CAMBIE DE ESTUDIO
UPDATE A
--SET CLUSTER_TOTAL = 'BLOQUEOS'
SET BASE = 'BLOQUEOS'
--SELECT A.*
FROM STAGE.ENCUESTAS_AURA A
INNER JOIN TEMP_BLOQUEOS B
ON A.CDR_CALL_ID = B.CDR_CALL_ID
WHERE A.BASE = 'AUTOGESTION'

/*--------------------------------------
-- AGREGAR CAMPOS DE ACCESADAS
----------------------------------------
--EXTRAE CDR_CALL_ID DE BLOQUEOS POR TRANSCRIPCION
TRUNCATE TABLE TEMP_UBIGEO
EXEC('

	SELECT CDR_CALL_ID,DEPARTAMENTO,PROVINCIA,DISTRITO
	FROM [172.30.249.166].REPO_LAYOUT.DBO.LYT_CONTACT_CENTER_ACCESADAS_'+@PERIODO+'

')
